algorithm:
scores := make([]float64, len(remaining))
	for i, rem := range remaining {
		newRem := rem - item
		utilization := float64(capacity-newRem) / float64(capacity)
		residualRatio := float64(newRem) / float64(capacity)
		gapPenalty := math.Exp(-5.0 * residualRatio)
		scores[i] = utilization + 0.2*math.Sqrt(residualRatio) + 0.1*gapPenalty
	}
	return scores
